title: <div><font face=".AppleColorEmojiUI">🔹</font> **Character Development** – Explo
content:
🔹 **Character Development** – Explore **Phoenix Jackson’s resilience and representation**.
🔹 **Motif and Recurring Imagery** – Identify **patterns that reinforce the story’s themes**.
🔹 **Social Commentary** – Discuss how **Welty critiques race, class, or gender dynamics**.

---

### **7.2 Formatting & Submission**
📌 **Formatting Requirements:**
✅ **12-pt Times New Roman**, double-spaced, 1-inch margins.
✅ **APA format** for in-text citations and references.
✅ **Submit as a Word document (.docx) or PDF** via Canvas.

📌 **Assessment Criteria:**
✅ **Thesis & Argumentation (30%)** – Clear, concise, well-supported argument.
✅ **Textual Evidence (30%)** – Effective use of direct quotes and paraphrases.
